description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah
comments.responseText:
Dear MILLATI,

Terima kasih telah meluangkan waktu untuk memberikan ulasan mengenai pengalaman Anda di Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah.

Kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang Anda alami, terutama terkait ketersediaan resepsionis, proses check-out, kondisi kamar mandi, serta respons staf yang kurang cepat. Hal ini tentu tidak sesuai dengan standar layanan yang kami harapkan.

Masukan Anda sangat penting bagi kami dan telah kami teruskan kepada tim terkait untuk segera dilakukan evaluasi serta perbaikan, khususnya pada operasional, kebersihan, dan pelayanan tamu.

Kami mohon maaf atas pengalaman yang kurang menyenangkan ini.

Best regards,
Andrew
Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah Team
comments.reviewComments: Resepsionis tdk standby 24jam, mau check out susah ambil kembali KTP, lampu kamar mandi mati, respon staf lambat, banyak puntung rokok di kamar mandi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah
comments.reviewNegatives: Kurang bersih lantainya, setidaknya sediakan sapu di kamar, air mandinya kecil bnget, kamarnya lumayan sempit. Sajadah nya sangat tipis, juga tidak disediakan handuk, dan sabun mandi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah
comments.responseText:
Dear REVELATION OF RIZKI,

Terima kasih telah membagikan ulasan Anda. Kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang Anda alami terkait kebersihan kamar dan fasilitas kamar mandi di Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah.

Masukan Anda sangat penting bagi kami dan akan segera diteruskan ke tim terkait untuk perbaikan fasilitas dan kebersihan agar pengalaman tamu lain lebih baik di masa mendatang.

Kami menghargai pendapat Anda dan berharap dapat memberikan layanan yang lebih memuaskan pada kunjungan berikutnya.

Salam hangat,
Nina
Tim Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah
comments.reviewComments: The room is just okay and many of the bathroom fixtures are not functioning, cleanliness is poor, the price is reasonable for the quality. 👍
comments.originalComment: kamar nya biasa aja dan banyak yg ga fungsi alat kamar mandi , kebersihan buruk, wajar harga sesuai kualitas👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Hotel O Banda Aceh near UIN formerly Alif Guest House Syariah
comments.reviewNegatives: Bed is not comfortable, so toilet sit. If they fix those things would be better
comments.reviewPositives: Very close to university, shops, mosques and In peaceful location 😀 very good
